caption: A large assembly of men sits in tiered seating within a formal hall, likely a diplomatic or governmental setting. The attendees are dressed in a variety of attire, including dark Western-style business suits and traditional Arab clothing, such as white thobes and ghutras. The men are seated in rows, facing forward, with some looking toward a central point of focus off-camera. The seating is arranged in a curved, amphitheater-like structure with wooden panels. In the background, a digital screen is partially visible on the left side of the scene. Across the sequence of frames, there is virtually no movement; the men remain seated and stationary in their respective positions, maintaining a solemn and attentive demeanor. No text, logos, or specific equipment are visible beyond the architectural elements and the clothing of the participants.
